claims.summary: Discrete delta labels need fluid cascade vocabulary for mixed being-state shifts.
claims.rationale: `ExperienceDeltaKindV1` includes `ComplexShift` and `CascadeShift`, giving the truth channel vocabulary for mixed transformation rather than only clip/compress/gate labels.

claims.summary: Experience deltas should carry spectral dimension, density-gradient, metadata, loss, authority, and test context without changing live vector delivery.
claims.rationale: `ExperienceDeltaV1` carries `spectral_dimension`, `metadata`, `pre`, `post`, `loss`, `loss_ratio`, `why`, `who_can_change_it`, and `how_to_test_it`; `ExperienceDeltaBusV1::from_deltas` keeps live vector and authority writes false.

claims.summary: Attaching richer fingerprints to wire/protocol or expanding live vector delivery would go beyond the bounded truth channel.
claims.rationale: Any protocol/ABI widening, semantic-vector expansion, or live actuation path belongs to a separately approved V2.
